memory.summary:
Earlier, Spunky picked up BabyMiku from her playpen to fulfill her promise of an outdoor adventure. Once they arrived outside, Spunky carefully checked to see if Miku was happy with where her toys were positioned. After ensuring everything was in a good spot, Spunky helped Miku stand up to begin her play. Now, the transition is complete as BabyMiku giggles happily while swinging on the swing. Her earlier anticipation has turned into pure joy as she finally enjoys the fresh air and her favorite outdoor activities.

Most recent confirmed (as of 2026-02-21 18:41:32): BabyMiku is giggling and playing on the swing outdoors.

BabyMiku Takeda said "weeee". Then babyMiku Takeda said "Miku high!". Then babyMiku Takeda said "Punky wook". Then spunkybunns said "I see you, so high. Be carefulls K". Then babyMiku Takeda said "/me reaches up in the air trying to touch clouds".

spunkybunns said "/me looks up "they super high uo there Miku".
